channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Broncos' Defeat Leaves Finals Contention in Doubt
item.description: The Brisbane Broncos' recent loss to the Cronulla Sharks has cast serious doubt on their chances of securing a finals berth in the 2026 NRL season. Missing key players like Reece Walsh and Payne Haas,...

item.title: Pakistan and Turkey Strengthen Infrastructure and Digital Cooperation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif of Pakistan engaged in high-level discussions with Turkish business leaders and Turkcell CEO Ali Taha Koç during his official visit to Istanbul. The talks focused on enha...

item.title: Three-Year-Old Boy Faces Long Rehabilitation After Crocodile Attack at Zoo
item.description: A three-year-old boy who was attacked by a crocodile in a zoo enclosure has undergone five surgeries and faces an extended rehabilitation process, according to his parents. The incident occurred on 18...

item.title: Hollywoodbets Durban July 2026: Saso’s Marquee Experience showcases African-inspired theme with music, fashion, and cuisine

item.title: Mistral AI: A Comprehensive Overview of Its Role in the Tech Landscape
item.description: Mistral AI, a European artificial intelligence startup, has rapidly grown into a major player in the competitive tech landscape. Founded in 2023, the company has secured over $4 billion in funding thr...

item.title: Kogi State Security Forces Recover 1,000 Stolen Livestock
item.description: The Kogi State Government, working with the Nigerian Army's 12 Brigade and other security agencies, successfully recovered about 1,000 stolen livestock from criminal networks. The operation targeted r...

item.title: Toronto and Vancouver Transit Systems Successfully Manage World Cup Crowds
item.description: Transit services in Toronto and Vancouver have effectively managed the surge in ridership caused by the 2026 World Cup matches, despite initial fears of a 'transit apocalypse.' The Toronto Transit Com...

item.title: Trump Memecoin Led to Over $3.8 Billion in Losses for Investors
item.description: A new report by the New York Times reveals that almost 1 million investors lost over $3.8 billion in Trump's memecoin, which plummeted from a peak of $75.35 to just $1.76. The cryptocurrency analytics...

item.title: Delhi Riots Conspiracy Case: Umar Khalid and Sharjeel Imam Denied Bail
item.description: A Delhi court rejected bail petitions for activists Umar Khalid and Sharjeel Imam in the 2020 Delhi riots conspiracy case. Additional Sessions Judge Sameer Bajpai stated the court is bound by the Supr...

item.title: Agricultural Workers Demand Removal of Biometric Attendance System Due to Infrastructure Issues
item.description: The Tamil Nadu Agricultural Workers’ Union has demanded the immediate withdrawal of the mandatory biometric attendance system for workers under the Viksit Bharat–Guarantee for Rozgar and Ajeevika Miss...

item.title: Perth billionaire Laurence Escalante resigns from VGW amid cultural and alcohol allegations
item.description: Controversial Perth billionaire Laurence Escalante, founder of online gambling company VGW, has resigned permanently from his role. His abrupt departure, effective immediately, follows days of scrutin...

item.title: Khwisero MP Warns Against Alcohol Abuse Destroying Families
item.description: Khwisero MP Christopher Aseka has raised alarms about the growing trend of men neglecting family responsibilities for alcohol, which is destabilizing households. The lawmaker announced a task force to...

item.title: President Samia Hails DITF's Role in Boosting Tanzanian Trade and Economic Growth
item.description: President Samia Suluhu Hassan commended the Dar es Salaam International Trade Fair (DITF) for its transformative impact on Tanzania's economy over five decades, celebrating its 50th anniversary. Durin...

item.title: Fisherfolk commemorate 10th anniversary of West Philippine Sea ruling in Subic
item.description: Around 250 fisherfolk from Zambales will stage a symbolic sea action on July 5, 2026, to mark the 10th anniversary of the Philippines' 2016 arbitral victory over China's claims in the West Philippine ...

item.title: IPID arrests suspect in R14.9 million precious stones theft case
